pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_task.sh:22) and task.json. Jitsi allows arbitrary room name creation.
Verified from docker-compose.yml (PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8080) and setup_task.sh (line 22). The web container maps port 8080:80.

Verified from Jitsi Meet source code (react/features/base/settings/reducer.ts) and GitHub issues #10729, #8477, #12504. This is the actual setting key stored in localStorage['features/base/settings'].
Verified from Jitsi Meet source code and configuration documentation. When disableSelfView is true, the self-view tile is hidden from the interface. Default value is false.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a locally-running Jitsi Meet instance (http://localhost:8080) deployed via Docker. The room name 'WebinarPrep' is a synthetic room created for this task. The setting key 'disableSelfView' is the authentic Jitsi Meet setting that controls self-view visibility, stored in localStorage under 'features/base/settings'. When set to true, the self-view (user's own video feed) is hidden from the interface while the camera remains active.
